channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Darwin parallel
item.description: I used to think as a matter of fact that Charles Darwin (1809–1882) and August Schleicher (1821–1868) knew each other – just looked up those dates. However, as far as I can tell, they never read each other’s works. Darwin published his On the Origin of Species in 1859. Schleicher presented his work on linguistic phylogenetic trees ~ 1850-1860s. When I learnt that they did not know each other, I found it even more remarkable.
